<!-- GENERATED by sphinxpress. Do not edit by hand. -->

<section id="canonical-store-v3-split-plan">
<h1>Canonical Store v3 Split Plan</h1>
<p>Status: draft, documentation only. No code changes in this phase.</p>
<section id="current-design-v2">
<h2>Current design (v2)</h2>
<p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">translation-store.json</span></code> (version 2) is both:</p>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p>provenance/history store (all translation versions, review candidates)</p></li>
<li><p>active selection store (active_version, active_review pointers)</p></li>
<li><p>source snapshot store (per-record source text + sha256)</p></li>
<li><p>review candidate store (reviews[] array)</p></li>
</ul>
<p>This is correct for a compact project but has two problems:</p>
<ol class="arabic simple">
<li><p><strong>Agent confusion</strong>: The store contains nested candidates, active pointers, source snapshots, review records, and version metadata. Agents inspecting it directly for quality review frequently misinterpret its structure (e.g., treating <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">versions</span></code> as a dict instead of a list).</p></li>
<li><p><strong>Merge conflict risk</strong>: Every translation insert, review insert, and activation mutates the same file. In collaborative workflows using version control, this creates serialization bottlenecks.</p></li>
<li><p><strong>Inspection overhead</strong>: Loading the entire store to find review gaps or search for a specific record’s effective target is O(records) per operation.</p></li>
</ol>
</section>
<section id="proposed-v3-split">
<h2>Proposed v3 split</h2>
<div class="highlight-text notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>translations/&lt;profile&gt;/state/
  current.json                 # active pointers and current source hashes only
  translation-candidates/
    0001.json                  # candidate history for source chunk 0001
    0002.json
  review-candidates/
    0001.json
    0002.json
  ledgers/
    translation-version-ledger.json
    review-ledger.json
</pre></div>
</div>
<section id="current-json">
<h3><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">current.json</span></code></h3>
<p>Compact canonical current ledger. One record per source record:</p>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;version&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">3</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;source_sha256&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;...&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="nt">&quot;records&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;0011-000001&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;chunk_id&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">11</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;part_id&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;source_sha256&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;...&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;active_version&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;1.3&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;active_review&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;R1.2&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;selected_kind&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;review&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">      </span><span class="nt">&quot;selected_ref&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;R1.2&quot;</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="p">}</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>Fields:</p>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">chunk_id</span></code>, <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">part_id</span></code>: backreferences to candidate files.</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">source_sha256</span></code>: the source text hash at the time of last insert.</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">active_version</span></code>: latest accepted translation version ref.</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">active_review</span></code>: latest accepted review candidate ref (if any).</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">selected_kind</span></code>: “translation” or “review” - which candidate is the effective output.</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">selected_ref</span></code>: the ref of the selected candidate.</p></li>
</ul>
<p>This file is the single source of truth for “what is the current effective target”.</p>
</section>
<section id="translation-candidates-chunk-json">
<h3><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">translation-candidates/&lt;chunk&gt;.json</span></code></h3>
<p>Immutable history of translation versions, sharded by chunk id. Each file contains an ordered array of <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">TranslationCandidate</span></code> records for one chunk:</p>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;id&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;0011-000001&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;record_id&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;0011-000001&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;chunk_id&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">11</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;version_ref&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;1.1&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;source&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;...&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;target&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;...&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;source_sha256&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;...&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;target_sha256&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;...&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;status&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;accepted&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;created_at&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;2026-...&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;context_sha256&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;...&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;baseline_sha256&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;...&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;reviewed&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">false</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="p">]</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>Chunks are small (default 50 records), so individual candidate files stay under ~50KB. Build and validation read current pointers from <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">current.json</span></code>, then load only the referenced candidate files.</p>
</section>
<section id="review-candidates-chunk-json">
<h3><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">review-candidates/&lt;chunk&gt;.json</span></code></h3>
<p>Immutable history of review candidates, sharded by chunk id:</p>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;id&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;0011-000001&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;record_id&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;0011-000001&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;chunk_id&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">11</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;pass_number&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;run_number&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">2</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;review_ref&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;R1.2&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;base_kind&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;review&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;base_ref&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;R1.1&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;base_target_sha256&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;...&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;target&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;...&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;target_sha256&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;...&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;status&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;accepted&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;created_at&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;2026-...&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;review_task_id&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;btr-...&quot;</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="p">]</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="translation-version-ledger-json">
<h3><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">translation-version-ledger.json</span></code></h3>
<p>Append-only ledger of all version refs in creation order. Used for audit and migration:</p>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;version_ref&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;1.1&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;record_id&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;0011-000001&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;chunk_id&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">11</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;created_at&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;...&quot;</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;version_ref&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;1.2&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;record_id&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;0011-000001&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;chunk_id&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">11</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;created_at&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;...&quot;</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="p">]</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="review-ledger-json">
<h3><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">review-ledger.json</span></code></h3>
<p>Append-only ledger of all review refs in creation order:</p>
<div class="highlight-json notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;review_ref&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;R1.1&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;record_id&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;0011-000001&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;chunk_id&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">11</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;created_at&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;...&quot;</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">},</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">{</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;review_ref&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;R1.2&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;record_id&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;0011-000001&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;chunk_id&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">11</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="nt">&quot;created_at&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;...&quot;</span>
<span class="w">  </span><span class="p">}</span>
<span class="p">]</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
</section>
<section id="benefits">
<h2>Benefits</h2>
<ol class="arabic simple">
<li><p><strong>Agent safety</strong>: Generated current-only indexes (<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">current-source.jsonl</span></code>, <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">current-target.jsonl</span></code>) are clear and unambiguous. The canonical files are never the primary search surface for agents.</p></li>
<li><p><strong>Reduced merge conflicts</strong>: Only <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">current.json</span></code> changes on every accepted insert (one small file). Candidate history files are append-only and rarely conflict (different chunks, different records).</p></li>
<li><p><strong>Inspection performance</strong>: <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">current.json</span></code> is ~200KB for a typical 7500-record project. Reading it is O(1) for most queries. Candidate files are only loaded when historical detail is needed.</p></li>
<li><p><strong>Atomic updates</strong>: Use write-then-rename for <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">current.json</span></code> (already used for <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">translation-store.json</span></code> via <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">write_json_model_atomic</span></code>). Candidate files are append-only; two concurrent inserts to different chunks never conflict.</p></li>
</ol>
</section>
<section id="migration-plan">
<h2>Migration plan</h2>
<section id="phase-1-parallel-write-v2-v3">
<h3>Phase 1: parallel write (v2 + v3)</h3>
<ol class="arabic simple">
<li><p>Add v3 write path alongside existing v2 write path.</p></li>
<li><p>On every accepted insert, write both v2 <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">translation-store.json</span></code> and the v3 files.</p></li>
<li><p>Add a <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx</span> <span class="pre">store</span> <span class="pre">migrate</span> <span class="pre">--to</span> <span class="pre">v3</span></code> command that converts v2 to v3.</p></li>
<li><p>Add a <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx</span> <span class="pre">store</span> <span class="pre">check</span> <span class="pre">--v3</span></code> validation that compares v2 and v3 consistency.</p></li>
</ol>
</section>
<section id="phase-2-switch-reads-to-v3">
<h3>Phase 2: switch reads to v3</h3>
<ol class="arabic simple">
<li><p>Update build, validation, review status, and all other read paths to use <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">current.json</span></code> + candidate files.</p></li>
<li><p>Generated indexes already read from <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">current.json</span></code>.</p></li>
<li><p>Run both v2 and v3 reads in parallel with consistency checks for one release cycle.</p></li>
</ol>
</section>
<section id="phase-3-drop-v2">
<h3>Phase 3: drop v2</h3>
<ol class="arabic simple">
<li><p>Stop writing <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">translation-store.json</span></code>.</p></li>
<li><p>Mark it as deprecated/legacy format.</p></li>
<li><p>Keep a read-only migration helper for one more release cycle, then remove.</p></li>
</ol>
</section>
</section>
<section id="prerequisites">
<h2>Prerequisites</h2>
<p>Before migration:</p>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p>Generated current-only indexes are stable (implemented in P2).</p></li>
<li><p>Review todo and QA scan commands are stable (implemented in P2).</p></li>
<li><p>Full test coverage for v3 write/read paths.</p></li>
<li><p>Migration command tested on real-world stores.</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
<section id="current-status">
<h2>Current status</h2>
<p>This document describes the planned v3 split. Implementation is deferred until:</p>
<ol class="arabic simple">
<li><p>The current generated-artifact approach (current-only indexes, review queue indexes) is proven stable.</p></li>
<li><p>The review workflow (P0 + P1 + P2) is complete and tested.</p></li>
<li><p>A real-world store reaches a size where merge conflicts or inspection performance become a problem.</p></li>
</ol>
</section>
</section>
